replies.text:
Fun fact:

James Earl Jones before passing vaway, authorized the use of his voice as AI for future productions.

Similarly, so did Dragonball Z Goku's Japanese voice actor Masako Nozawa (even though she is still alive).
And I heard a test voice of it for her in English and to me it sounded better than the official English voice of Goku done by Sean Schimmel who as we all know is a prick anyway. 🤔
